headline: How The Charles Schwab (SCHW) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Fair Value
summary: Charles Schwab’s fair value anchor has been trimmed from US$118.00 to US$115.00, a small shift that still matters if you are watching how the story around the stock is evolving. This change sits alongside a split in recent analyst calls, with several target cuts, a few increases, and a fresh Outperform rating all feeding into how research desks frame Schwab’s execution risk and support for its valuation. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting signals and what they mean for...
